files.Title: LuauInterop.Ast.LuauParser
files.Summary: Parses the JSON produced by luau_parse and constructs the AST.

files.Title: LuauInterop.Compilation.LuauCompileOptions
files.Summary: Represents the options for compiling a Luau chunk.

files.Title: LuauInterop.Compilation.LuauCompiler
files.Summary: Provides functionality to compile Luau source code into bytecode chunks.

files.Title: LuauInterop.LuauBase
files.Summary: Base class for all Luau objects that hold a reference to the Lua state.

files.Title: LuauInterop.LuauChunk
files.Summary: Represents a compiled Luau chunk, which is a block of bytecode that can be loaded into a Lua State.

files.Title: LuauInterop.LuauException
files.Summary: Represents an exception that occurs during Luau compilation or execution.

files.Title: LuauInterop.LuauType
files.Summary: Represents the type of a Lua value.

files.Title: LuauInterop.Native.LuaConstants
files.Summary: Static class containing constants used in the Luau C API.

files.Title: LuauInterop.Native.LuaState
files.Summary: Represents a Lua state. This is a thin wrapper around the native lua_State pointer.

files.Title: LuauInterop.Native.NativeMethods
files.Summary: Class containing P/Invoke signatures for the Luau C API.

files.Title: LuauInterop.Runtime.LuauCallback.NativeDelegate
files.Summary: The native delegate that wraps the managed function.

files.Title: LuauInterop.Runtime.LuauCallback
files.Summary: A C# function exposed to Luau.

files.Title: LuauInterop.Runtime.LuauDelegate
files.Summary: Wraps any C# delegate for use as a Luau function. Handles argument marshalling and return value pushing automatically.
